title: The Silent Voyager
author: Friedrich Nietzsche
description: A deep dive into the philosophical journey of the human soul and existence.

title: Mastering React Hooks
author: Dan Abramov
description: A comprehensive guide to managing state and side effects in modern React applications.

title: The Stranger

description: A classic story exploring the absurdity of life through the eyes of Meursault.

title: Astrophysics for People in a Hurry
author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
description: The nature of space and time, simplified for the curious mind.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship for writing better, maintainable code.

title: The Alchemist

description: A fable about following your dream and listening to your heart.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: Exploring how biology and history have defined us and enhanced our understanding of what it means to be 'human'.

title: JavaScript: The Good Parts
author: Douglas Crockford
description: Uncovering the beautiful, elegant, and highly expressive language that is JavaScript.

author: George Orwell
description: A dystopian social science fiction novel and cautionary tale about totalitarianism.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: Explaining a range of subjects in cosmology, including the Big Bang and black holes.

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
author: Martin Kleppmann
description: The big ideas behind reliable, scalable, and maintainable systems.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A story of obsession, wealth, and the elusive American Dream.
